name: piano_online
description: Interactive bilingual virtual piano and song-learning website.

scripts.test: npm run generate:songs && node --check js/main.js && node --check js/song-discovery.js && node --check js/song-page.js && node --check js/concert-hall-ui.js && node --check js/piano-audio.js && node --check js/audio-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/render-song-pages.mjs && node --check scripts/build-site.mjs && npm run test:audio && npm run test:home && npm run test:secondary && npm run test:songs
